detu_schema: deconfb-detu/1: lm.choose(item, keys, gold, seed, attempt_code) with attempt_code = attempt*(m+1) + probe_index, m=3; probe_index 0 = candidate; (attempt=0, probe_index=0) greedy argmax (IF-C attempt-0 semantics); all other codes sample via torch.Generator(SEED_BASE*10000 + seed*100 + attempt_code), SEED_BASE=20260710 (imported pinned f2bt module constant)

R1.pinned_by: f2b-replicate / f2b-transfer pins.model_revisions (same revision, already cached on the kot-hf-cache volume; PROPOSED-ASM-1106)

outcome_note: NOT a hypothesis verdict — raw run-records only; the verdict is computed by the pinned analysis/deconf_b.py + tools/registry/verdict-gen.py under run-vs-audit separation. Rider on every downstream sentence: self-authored items, kernel-covered slice, oracle-addressed store; external adjudication removes membership-gold circularity, not item-generation or store-addressing circularity.

pins.adjInternalConsistency: the runner fail-closes on: summary.json labels_sha256 != sha256(labels.jsonl) (ERR_ADJ_PIN); resolved gold_ext count != summary n_ext_labelled (ERR_ADJ_COUNTS); eval-set size != the pre-registered n_items 333 (ERR_EVAL_N); item-id-list sha != evalItemIdsSha256 (ERR_EVAL_IDS); any d-qa-t id missing from labels.jsonl (ERR_LABELS_MISSING); any eval item off the DQA-type/kernel_checkable surface (ERR_ITEM_CHECKABLE) or gold_ext off the answer surface (ERR_GOLD_SURFACE)
pins.perItemRecordSha256: every d-qa-t item carries record_path + record_sha256; the fallback kernel arm's verifier re-hashes the canonical record file at use and fails closed (ERR_RECORD_PIN); the GS-A arm consumes the sha-pinned gs-a.jsonl projection instead (no record files at check time, by construction)
pins.pinSources: dqat/dadjt/dqa/dxif/kernel/molecules pins = the f2b-transfer stage-2 pins verbatim (frozen record + its d-adj-t ops amendment; PROPOSED-ASM-1106 asset reuse); gsaStoreSha256 = the A1-built GS-A store as-built, no rebuild; f2bRunnerSha256 = the A1-verified harness pin (PROPOSED-ASM-1108 — byte-identical, any edit voids the A1 lemma); f2btRunnerSha256 = the stage-2 staged-bytes runner sha (provenance-modal.json, 20260711-184448-modal); a1AuditSha256 = poc/deconf-a1/audit_a1.py at the complete-certificate commit; evalItemIdsSha256 = sha256 over one item id per '\n'-terminated line, ALL 333 resolved-gold_ext d-qa-t items in pinned rank order; bm25CorpusSha256/bm25IndexSha256 = canonical serialisations computed by stageb_runner.py (deconfb-bm25/1) and asserted at every run; queryFnSourceSha256 = sha256 over the concatenated source of query_of_item/query_from_prompt/bm25_tokens/BM25Index/render_corpus/build_retrieval (function-granularity freeze check)
